name: TRUFFLE
short_description: TRUFFLE is a minimalist puzzle maze game where touching the walls kills you instantly. It is a high difficulty, patience testing, dexterity game.
detailed_description:
What is the Game?

TRUFFLE is a minimalist puzzle maze game where touching the walls kills you instantly! The game will put your patience and dexterity to the test as you complete the large variety of levels. Collect the mushroom at the end of each level to win and don't touch any walls!

Features

  • 20 Core levels to complete
  • 6 Bonus levels to unlock
  • 80 Watching Eyes to collect

About the Developer

Hello! I am Ethan Robichaux and I solo developed this game over 4 months. At the time of TRUFFLE releasing I am a college student and I create games in my free time. This is my 4th full Steam game. TRUFFLE is also a complete remake of my first game with over double the content and made in an entirely new game engine. This game is completely free because I want as many people as possible to be able to play and enjoy the game I worked very hard on!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian
